== Notes for [[Item:Q107173|Q107173]] ==

Progenitor of ''Fatimid Imamate'' ('''Caliphate''') of '''Egypt'''.

'''8th Shia Ismai'li Imaam'''

* Date of Ascension: 11th Shawwal 193 AH (31st July 809 AD)
* Period of Imamate: 19 Years
* Wilaadat (Birth): 179 AH (795 AD)
* Wafaat (Death): 212 AH (827/ 828 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wafi_Ahmad

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taqi_Muhammad

Source 3: http://www.ismaili.net/histoire/history04/history409.html

Source 4: http://www.ismaili.net/histoire/history04/history410.html

Source 5: http://www.ismaili.net/histoire/history04/history413.html

Source 6: http://www.ismaili.net/histoire/history04/history417.html

Source 7: http://www.ismaili.net/histoire/history04/history418.html

Source 8: http://www.ismaili.net/histoire/history04/history419.html

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000017506095901

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
